title: SOC 2 TSC to HITRUST CSF Crosswalk Seed
source_tsc: AICPA TSP Section 100 (2017, 2022 Revised Points of Focus)

mappings.hitrust_domain: Domain 11: Access Control + Domain 18: Physical & Environmental Security
Domain 12: Audit Logging & Monitoring + Domain 15: Incident Management
Domain 14: Third-Party Assurance + Domain 17: Risk Management
No direct v11 domain equivalent (application-level processing controls); consult MyCSF

notes: Category-level crosswalk seed. Domain numbering/names verified against HITRUST v11 sample validated-assessment reports (hitrustalliance.net) and assessor publications, 2026-06-10. Point-of-focus granularity requires HITRUST MyCSF for definitive mapping. The HITRUST validated assessment is separate from SOC 2 and produces a different opinion structure.
